page_content: KNES798 Internship in Physical Education/Sports Management (1-8 Credits) Practical application of previously acquired skills and knowledge in a sport and/or physical education setting. Emphasis on selected experiences to enhance the total academic program of the student. The internship site assignment will depend upon student's background and career goals. Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Kinesiology department. Repeatable to: 8 credits.
